characters.name: Klein
characters.description: The protagonist, who seems to have undergone a significant, possibly mystical, transformation or journey between worlds.

characters.name: Welch
characters.description: A victim found at a crime scene, a history graduate from Khoy University. He had found an ancient diary.

characters.name: Naya
characters.description: A victim found at a crime scene, a history graduate from Khoy University.

characters.name: Commander
characters.description: An authority figure to whom reports are given, likely in charge of the investigation.

characters.name: Antigonus
characters.description: An ancient figure or lineage mentioned in a diary, associated with the Fourth Epoch and the Black Emperor. Possibly a historical or mythical entity.

characters.name: Black Emperor
characters.description: A title associated with Antigonus, suggesting a historical or mythical ruler.

characters.name: Melissa
characters.description: A character close to Klein, possibly a sister or relative, whom Klein is concerned about.

characters.name: Madame Smirnova
characters.description: A shopkeeper or acquaintance who interacts with Klein, offering comments on his prospects.

characters.name: Emperor Intis
characters.description: A historical figure mentioned in relation to the invention of a game.

characters.name: Roseul Gustav
characters.description: The inventor of the game 'The Landlord', apparently from a century ago.

characters.name: Emperor Roselle Gustav
characters.description: Mentioned as a historical figure and potential "Transmigrator" (someone from another world).

characters.name: Klein Moretti
characters.description: The protagonist, addressed as "Lost Lamb" and implied to be seeking guidance.

characters.name: Fors
characters.description: A "Spirit Medium" who is revealed to be using Tarot cards and acting as a fortune teller. She disguises herself.

characters.name: Cho Mingrui
characters.description: Another identity or name associated with the protagonist, possibly an alternative self.

characters.name: The Fool
characters.description: A moniker the protagonist is addressed by, suggesting a role or persona within this context.

characters.name: A naive teenage girl
characters.description: A character whose voice is heard, described as naive and belonging to a young girl.

characters.name: A calm and cautious person
characters.description: Another character whose voice is heard, described as calm and cautious.

characters.name: A lady from Loen
characters.description: A noblewoman from the Loen region, seeking knowledge about becoming 'transcendent'.

characters.name: A person from the distant Sonia Sea
characters.description: An individual from a faraway region, implied to be the one addressing the lady from Loen.

characters.name: Leonard Mitchell
characters.description: A detective from the Dales Police, investigating the deaths of Nya and Welsh.

characters.name: Roselle
characters.description: An Emperor who created a set of cards different from Tarot cards and reportedly saw the 'Tablets of Heresy'.

characters.name: Nya
characters.description: Mentioned as having committed suicide, but the speaker suggests they were possessed.

characters.name: Welsh McGovern
characters.description: Deceased, investigated for suicide. The speaker visited his residence and he lost a pistol.

characters.name: Moretti
characters.description: Addressed by Leonard Mitchell. Likely a suspect or person of interest in the investigation.

characters.name: Mr. Moriarty
characters.description: A character addressed by name, possibly a significant figure or someone the protagonist is interacting with.

characters.name: The "psychologist expert"
characters.description: A professional who can help recover lost memories.

characters.name: Nightmare Falcon
characters.description: A persona or entity that the protagonist encounters, possibly related to dreams or illusions.

characters.name: Will's house
characters.description: A mentioned location, possibly a destination or a place of significance.

characters.name: Antigonus dynasty
characters.description: A historical lineage or group related to a lost diary.

characters.name: Don Smith
characters.description: A member of the Night Falcon team, associated with the Evernight faction. Also a member of the Owada District Police.

characters.name: Daly Simon
characters.description: A member of the Night Falcon team, associated with the Evernight faction.

characters.name: Jenkins
characters.description: Mentioned in the context of poems and an 'extraordinary fool'.

characters.name: Melisya Moretti
characters.description: Klein's younger sister and a student at the Tingen Technical School.

characters.name: Audrey Hall
characters.description: Lady Justice, a member of the Tarot Club.

characters.name: Alger Wilson
characters.description: The Hanged Man, a member of the Tarot Club. Speaks in ancient Hermes language.
